promptDetail.pageDescription: Manage basic info, model settings, and content of prompts.
promptDetail.placeholderPromptText: Enter prompt content. Use {{variable}} format for variables.
promptDetail.alertOfflineNoCreate: Cannot create new prompts while offline.
promptDetail.confirmDelete:
Are you sure you want to delete this prompt?
Deleted prompts cannot be recovered.
promptDetail.paramDesc_temperature: Controls creativity/randomness of responses. Closer to 0 means more consistent and predictable; higher values produce more diverse and creative responses. (Recommended: 0.3–0.7 for translation)
promptDetail.paramDesc_max_tokens: Maximum number of tokens (words/characters) to generate. Too small may truncate responses; too large increases cost. (Recommended: 1000–4000)
promptDetail.paramDesc_top_p: Cumulative probability-based sampling. Closer to 1 considers more word candidates. Fine-tune response quality by adjusting alongside temperature. (Recommended: 0.9–1.0)
promptDetail.paramDesc_top_k: Only considers the top K word candidates. Smaller values produce more focused responses; larger values produce more diverse ones. (Recommended: 10–50)
promptDetail.paramDesc_presence_penalty: Encourages introducing new topics. Positive values avoid already-mentioned content; negative values maintain existing topics. (Recommended: 0–0.5)
promptDetail.paramDesc_frequency_penalty: Controls word repetition. Positive values reduce repetition of the same words; negative values allow repetition. (Recommended: 0–0.5)
promptDetail.paramDesc_chunk_size: Number of subtitle segments to translate at once. Too large may exceed context length; too small increases API calls. (Recommended: 30–100)
